title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.
![Nippon: Zaibatsu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_e28ab86e.jpg)

2. **Goa**
*2004*
Run a spice trade business in colonial-era India in this closed-loop economy game.
![Goa](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_cfb868c6.jpg)

3. **Brass: Pittsburgh**
*2027*
Take part in the United States' late 19th-century industrial boom.
![Brass: Pittsburgh](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_63c6631e.png)

4. **Regicide Legacy**
*2025*
Defeat corrupted enemies and unlock rewards over 12 challenging missions.
![Regicide Legacy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_03ae23b4.jpg)

5. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_e270b641.png)

6. **Mechs vs. Minions**
*2016*
Cooperatively program and pilot your mechs to defeat an army of marauding minions.
![Mechs vs. Minions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_c4145633.jpg)

7. **Arcs**
*2024*
Rule the galaxy with your court, fleet, and cities.
![Arcs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_40a13ebf.png)

8. **Eternal Decks**
*2025*
Can you solve each stage before your deck runs out?
![Eternal Decks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_4f326a9b.png)

9. **Ostia**
*2022*
1-4 players create trade routes in the Mediterranean using a mancala/resource system!
![Ostia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_eee9ff8a.jpg)

10. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_7999b748.jpg)

11. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_559cbc2b.jpg)

12. **Regicide**
*2020*
Work together as brave adventurers to defeat the corrupted monarchy.
![Regicide](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_e8c73daa.jpg)

13. **Arkham Horror: The Card Game**
*2026*
Investigate the mysteries of Arkham while cosmic horrors stand in your way.
![Arkham Horror: The Card Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_80eb3a76.png)

14. **Yotei**
*2025*
A Machi building game of forest, mountains, and potatoes.
![Yotei](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_5ac68ac8.png)

15. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_f4cd44f5.jpg)

16. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*2022*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_7e60383c.jpg)

17. **Slay the Spire: The Board Game**
*2024*
Craft a unique deck, discover powerful relics, and Slay the Spire together!
![Slay the Spire: The Board Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_f108bafa.png)

18. **Wondrous Creatures**
*2024*
Build the best reserve in the world for 100+ fantastic creatures!
![Wondrous Creatures](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_2f2f712f.jpg)

19. **Magical Athlete**
*2025*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_a215f12e.png)

20. **Dune: Imperium – Uprising**
*2023*
Deploy agents, build your deck, and engage in strategic battles to control Arrakis.
![Dune: Imperium – Uprising](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_878aa46c.jpg)

21. **Speakeasy**
*2025*
Earn money running a Manhattan speakeasy business during Prohibition.
![Speakeasy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_47a81d34.jpg)

22. **Cozy Stickerville**
*2026*
Build your village with over 800 stickers! 
![Cozy Stickerville](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_bcdbe821.jpg)

23. **Spirit Island**
*2017*
Island Spirits join forces using elemental powers to defend their home from invaders.
![Spirit Island](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_0d6f6542.jpg)

24. **Arkham Horror: The Card Game**
*2016*
Investigate the horrors of Arkham while courting cosmic doom.
![Arkham Horror: The Card Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_caaff2a3.jpg)

25. **Orloj: The Prague Astronomical Clock**
*2025*
Become part of Prague’s legacy by assembling the majestic and intricate Orloj.
![Orloj: The Prague Astronomical Clock](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_5d793d33.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*15 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_e22b761a.jpg)

2. **Harmonies**
*23 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_ee4046bb.jpg)

3. **Castle Combo**
*18 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_7cc5d4ad.jpg)

4. **Ark Nova**
*51 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_c3048193.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*87 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_3e3c3ea6.jpg)

6. **Bomb Busters**
*11 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_a9474522.png)

7. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*40 months on the list*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_b56ec88e.jpg)

8. **Azul**
*101 months on the list*
Artfully embellish the walls of your palace by drafting the most beautiful tiles.
![Azul](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_60ad8650.png)

9. **Terraforming Mars**
*114 months on the list*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_f56439eb.jpg)

10. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*33 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_827aa612.jpg)

11. **Forest Shuffle**
*30 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_f9ce73cc.jpg)

12. **Cascadia**
*56 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_cccc8397.jpg)

13. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*63 months on the list*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_db3ea9b6.jpg)

14. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*16 months on the list*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_73dcd61c.jpg)

15. **Faraway**
*23 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_c3c1529e.png)

16. **Sky Team**
*30 months on the list*
Work together silently to land a plane under increasingly challenging circumstances.
![Sky Team](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_848fc82d.jpg)

17. **Hot Streak**
*2 months on the list*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_698cd378.jpg)

18. **Magical Athlete**
*2 months on the list*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_129a273f.png)

19. **The Gang**
*9 months on the list*
Bet together the order of your hands in Texas Hold'em Poker to win together.
![The Gang](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_a722297e.jpg)

20. **The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game**
*9 months on the list*
Travel from the Shire and overcome every obstacle as a team.
![The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_6e6e7627.jpg)

21. **The White Castle**
*29 months on the list*
Become the most influential clan in Japan's Himeji stronghold.
![The White Castle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_8fe63d64.jpg)

22. **Carcassonne**
*273 months on the list*
Shape the medieval French landscape, claiming cities, monasteries, roads, and farms.
![Carcassonne](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_acd9b8aa.jpg)

23. **Toy Battle**
*2 months on the list*
Send forth an army of toys to conquer territories.
![Toy Battle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_faa05f1a.jpg)

24. **Brass: Birmingham**
*16 months on the list*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_ab2e29dd.jpg)

25. **Splendor**
*143 months on the list*
Renaissance merchants race to grab gems, acquire property, and please nobility.
![Splendor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-12/toplist/bgg_44bc74fe.jpg)
